commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh You shall not be frightened by them: for the LORD your God is among you, a mighty God and terrible. Septuagint, "be wounded. "In the war with the Madianites, not one was killed, (Numbers xxxi. 49,) as Josephus ( iii. 2,) informs us, was also the case when king Amalec and his people attacked the Hebrews, Exodus xvii. The people seem to have expected such a miraculous interference of Providence in their favour; and hence, when 36 were slain at the siege of Hai, all were greatly dejected, Josue vii.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
